description: Fragment of a letter sent to the nasi Shelomo b. Jesse with complaints about Yosef and Yehuda of Cairo who did not answer the writer's letter but instead wrote to his adversaries. Akko (Acre) and Damascus are mentioned. Dated 1237. (Information from Goitein's index cards) The discoloration along the upper edge and inner lines of the fragment may have resulted from fire damage.
description_he: קטע מכתב לנשיא שלמה ב' ישי בתלונות על יוסף ויהודה מקהיר שלא ענו למכתבו. מוזכרים עכו ודמשק. מתוארך 1237.
